title: ACS demographic items (person-level)
license: US Government public domain (U.S. Census Bureau). Federal race/ethnicity categories follow OMB standards; use the OMB minimum categories for federal-comparable reporting.

provenance.attribution: American Community Survey questionnaire (2026). U.S. Census Bureau.
provenance.wording_note: Item stems verbatim from census.gov; the FULL response-option layout (esp. race sub-categories and educational-attainment levels) should be confirmed against the current ACS questionnaire PDF (publicly available; the PDF blocks automated fetch, so confirm manually). Use OMB minimum categories for federal-comparable reporting.

ru_status: draft_forward_translation — NOT validated. Federal race/Hispanic categories are US OMB constructs: translate labels, do NOT re-localize the conceptual categories. Run TRAPD before use. verbatim_ok=false for RU.

items.en: What is this person's age and what is this person's date of birth?
items.ru_draft: Сколько этому человеку лет и какова его дата рождения?
items.note: Collected as age (years) + date of birth (month/day/year). Confirm exact field layout against the questionnaire.

items.en: Is this person of Hispanic, Latino, or Spanish origin?
options_en: No, not of Hispanic, Latino, or Spanish origin
Yes, another Hispanic, Latino, or Spanish origin — print origin
items.ru_draft: Является ли этот человек лицом латиноамериканского (Hispanic, Latino) или испанского происхождения?
items.note: OMB treats Hispanic origin and race as separate concepts; ask both. Confirm write-in instructions against questionnaire.

items.en: What is this person's race? Mark one or more boxes AND print origins.
options_en: Black or African Am. — print origins
American Indian or Alaska Native — print enrolled or principal tribe(s)
Asian (e.g., Chinese, Filipino, Asian Indian, Vietnamese, Korean, Japanese, Other Asian) — print details
Native Hawaiian or Other Pacific Islander (e.g., Native Hawaiian, Samoan, Chamorro, Other) — print details
Some other race — print race or origin
items.ru_draft: Какова раса этого человека? Отметьте один или несколько вариантов И укажите происхождение.
options_ru_draft: Американский индеец или коренной житель Аляски — укажите племя
Азиат (например, китаец, филиппинец, индиец, вьетнамец, кореец, японец, другой) — укажите
Коренной гаваец или житель тихоокеанских островов — укажите
Другая раса — укажите расу или происхождение
items.note: OMB minimum categories. Confirm the exact 2026 ACS sub-category layout against the questionnaire before fielding.

items.en: Does this person speak a language other than English at home?
items.ru_draft: Говорит ли этот человек дома на языке, отличном от английского?
items.note: Gate. If No → skip ACS-LANG2 and ACS-LANG3.

items.en: How well does this person speak English?
items.ru_draft: Насколько хорошо этот человек говорит по-английски?
items.note: Asked only if ACS-LANG1 = Yes. Key for CMA limited-English-proficiency identification and language-group coverage.

items.en: What is the highest degree or level of school this person has COMPLETED?
items.ru_draft: Какой наивысший уровень образования или ученую степень этот человек ЗАВЕРШИЛ?
items.note: Full ordered option list (no schooling → doctorate) — confirm exact levels against the current ACS questionnaire before fielding.
